title: Ewok (disambiguation)
content:
Several titles with the name '''Ewok''' or '''Ewoks''' have been used throughout ''[[Star Wars]]'':

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Ewok]]''', a [[Sentience|sentient]] creature

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]]''', a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] creature

==[[In-universe|Out-of-universe]]==
*'''''[[Ewoks (television series)|Ewoks]]''''', a [[1985]] cartoon series
*'''''[[Star Wars: Ewoks (1985)|Star Wars: Ewoks]]''''', a [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series loosely based on the above
*'''''[[Caravan of Courage: An Ewok Adventure]]''''', a telefilm starring Ewoks
*'''''[[Ewoks: The Battle for Endor]]''''', sequel to the above
*'''''[[Ewoks (song)|Ewoks]]''''', the opening theme song from the [[Ewoks: Season One|first season]] of [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']]
*'''''[[Ewoks (soundtrack)|Ewoks]]''''', the soundtrack to the above two films
*'''''[[Return of the Ewok]]''''', a [[Wikipedia:Mockumentary|mockumentary]] made by [[Warwick Davis]]
*'''''[[Star Wars: Ewoks (2024)|Star Wars: Ewoks]]''''', a canon [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series

{{Disambig}}

|es=Ewok (desambiguación)
